seoTitle: Dunbible vs Duncans Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dunbible and Duncans Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dunbible vs Duncans Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dunbible and Duncans Creek.
heading: Dunbible vs Duncans Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dunbible, New South Wales and Duncans Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dunbible has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Duncans Creek (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dunbible or Duncans Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dunbible has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Duncans Creek scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dunbible scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Duncans Creek scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dunbible or Duncans Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dunbible has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
